title: NewDocument deprecation notice gives no migration guidance
body: type.go marks NewDocument as deprecated in favor of using net/http directly with NewDocumentFromReader, but doesn't show how to replicate the response-status validation NewDocument used to perform automatically.

title: SetHtml misparses fragments containing table rows
body: manipulation.go's SetHtml() parses the given HTML string as a generic body fragment, so passing 'x' without a wrapping silently loses the row because it isn't parsed in a table context.

title: Add ParentsUntil to complement ParentsFiltered
body: traversal.go has Parents and ParentsFiltered, but there's no ParentsUntil, unlike jQuery, making it harder to walk up the ancestor chain until a stopping selector matches.

title: Eq() panics on an out-of-range negative index
body: array.go's Eq(index) supports negative indices to count from the end of the selection, but an out-of-range negative index panics instead of returning an empty Selection the way an out-of-range positive index does.
